meaning: 厄尔布鲁士山[苏联西南部](高加索山脉的最高峰)
examples: He finished his circuitous journey on the summit of Russia's Mt. Elbrus on July 12.
The highest peak in the Caucasus, Mount Elbrus, lies on the border with Kabardino-Balkaria.
Kabardino-Balkaria is home to the two highest peaks in the North Caucasus, Mount Elbrus and Dykh Tau.
